title: corybas autumnalis
intro: Corybas autumnalis, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a type of orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. It is a terrestrial orchid with a rich history in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Corybas autumnalis include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
